rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies two real naming issues confirmed in the diff: mixed camelCase/snake_case on `unipotentRadical_trivial'` (which also has a spurious prime and proves only `True`), and inconsistent snake_case fields in `ReductiveGroup`/`SemisimpleGroup` versus camelCase fields in `AffineAlgGroup`. Acting on these changes produces a PR with consistent naming; Review 1's blanket approval leaves both problems in place.
